notes: Moves like a shopping cart with a court date. Sells fast, lies faster.
Smells like sidewalk rain and bad economics. Somehow knows the value of copper.
Too calm, too clean, and somehow worse than both. Never asks for a receipt.
Offers items, trades, and explanations that all have missing screws.
Always needs cash today. Yesterday was also today somehow.
Sweats through a denim jacket; often has items with stories that do not survive follow-up questions.
Knows value. Will absolutely judge your display case.
Sells tools, parts, and objects that smell like a garage fire.
Everything is definitely from his cousin. Cousins have been busy.
Wants a discount because Mercury is in retrograde, probably on Facebook Marketplace.
Negotiates with eye contact and visible neck tattoos.
Asks if the serial number being scratched off is 'normal pawn shop stuff'.
Comes back holding your receipt like evidence in a municipal trial.
May sell treasure. May sell a box of wet teeth. Budget accordingly.
Original prototype sprite. Kept as inactive fallback/reference only; not used in gameplay rotation.
Dresses like a casino carpet and talks like every object has appreciated since 1978.
Confident, impatient, and dressed like subtlety owes him money.
Sweet, broke, and one jackpot away from solving the problem she created with the last jackpot.
Shows up later when the paperwork smell gets too strong.
